entities.name: BANGLADESH
entities.description: A country in South Asia where land use and land cover changes were analyzed at a national scale

entities.name: LAND USE AND LAND COVER CHANGES
entities.description: The modification of the Earth's terrestrial surface, analyzed quantitatively at the national scale in Bangladesh

entities.name: LANDSAT SATELLITE DATA
entities.description: Satellite imagery used to interpret land use and land cover changes from 2000 to 2010

entities.name: GLOBAL SURFACEWATER DATASET
entities.description: A dataset employed to account for the influences of water seasonality on land cover changes

entities.name: WATER SEASONALITY
entities.description: The seasonal variation in water presence that affects the accuracy of land use and land cover change analysis

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL LAND
entities.description: A land cover type that experienced significant gross gain and loss on a local scale

entities.name: WATERBODIES
entities.description: A land cover type that saw conversion from agricultural land, particularly in the southwest region

entities.name: FOREST
entities.description: A land cover type that underwent changes to shrubland in the southeast region

entities.name: SHRUBLAND
entities.description: A land cover type resulting from the conversion of forest land

entities.name: CLIMATE DYNAMICS
entities.description: A biophysical driver contributing to the change from forest to shrubland

entities.name: EXTREME EVENTS
entities.description: Environmental events that drive the conversion of forest to shrubland

entities.name: URBAN AND RURAL HOUSEHOLDS
entities.description: Socioeconomic factors driving land cover changes in both the southeast and southwest regions

entities.name: SOUTHEAST REGION
entities.description: A region in Bangladesh where forest to shrubland changes were driven by climate and household dynamics

entities.name: SOUTHWEST REGION
entities.description: A region in Bangladesh where agricultural land converted to waterbodies due to socioeconomic and precipitation drivers

entities.name: POPULATION GROWTH
entities.description: A socioeconomic driver of the conversion from agricultural land to standing waterbodies

entities.name: DISTANCE TO CITIES AND MAJOR ROADS
entities.description: A spatial socioeconomic driver of the conversion from agricultural land to waterbodies

entities.name: PRECIPITATION DYNAMICS
entities.description: A biophysical driver of the conversion from agricultural land to standing waterbodies
